raw_text:
```json

  "claims": [
    "Bowie's Law will require a 72-hour public notice before an adoptable pet can be euthanized.",
    "AB 595 will commission a statewide study to provide data on overcrowding at animal shelters.",
    "The study aims to develop comprehensive strategies to help stop unnecessary euthanasia of adoptable pets.",
    "California's animal shelters continue to remain full of adoptable animals.",
```
